Class EnemySpawner

java.lang.Object
game.entity.EnemySpawner
public class EnemySpawner extends Object
Owns all enemy-spawn logic that previously cluttered GameController. GameController calls: spawner.setupInitial() — once, at game start spawner.tick() — every 10 s (or 30 s in phase 2) spawner.triggerPhase2() — when Stage-5 kill threshold is hit

      public boolean triggerPhase2()
      Clears all obstacles and switches to Hard-enemy spawning. Returns true on first trigger; false if already in phase 2.
